name: NIST Cybersecurity Framework
description: Outcome-based cybersecurity framework organized by function (Govern, Identify, Protect, Detect, Respond, Recover). Representative subcategories mapped to Azure. Summaries are paraphrased.

controls.title: Risk Management Strategy
controls.summary: Risk appetite and management processes are established and communicated.
controls.remediation: Define cloud risk appetite, document exceptions, and review Defender for Cloud Secure Score against agreed targets.

controls.title: Asset Management
controls.summary: Assets (systems, data, services) are inventoried and classified.
controls.remediation: Enforce tagging via Azure Policy, inventory with Azure Resource Graph, and classify data stores by sensitivity.

controls.title: Risk Assessment
controls.summary: Threats, vulnerabilities, and impacts are identified and analyzed.
controls.remediation: Run STRIDE threat modeling per workload, review Defender recommendations, and track risks in a register.

controls.title: Identity Management and Access Control
controls.summary: Access is limited to authorized users, processes, and devices via managed identity lifecycle and least privilege.
controls.remediation: Centralize on Entra ID, enforce MFA and Conditional Access, use PIM, and run access reviews.

controls.title: Data Security
controls.summary: Data at rest and in transit is protected consistent with its classification.
controls.remediation: Platform encryption plus CMK where required, TLS 1.2+, private endpoints for data services, DLP on egress paths.

controls.title: Platform Security
controls.summary: Hardware, software, and services are hardened, patched, and securely configured.
controls.remediation: IaC baselines, Azure Policy enforcement, patch SLAs, and container image scanning before deploy.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.summary: Systems and networks are monitored to find anomalies and potentially adverse events.

check_hints.fail_message: Architecture has no continuous security monitoring capability.

controls.remediation: Enable Defender plans across resource types and centralize telemetry in Log Analytics/Sentinel with analytics rules.

controls.title: Adverse Event Analysis
controls.summary: Anomalies and alerts are analyzed to understand scope and impact.
controls.remediation: Define triage runbooks, correlate with Sentinel incidents, and preserve evidence per retention policy.

controls.title: Incident Management
controls.summary: Responses to detected incidents are managed through defined processes.
controls.remediation: Maintain IR plans with roles and severity matrix, automate containment via Logic Apps, and run post-incident reviews.

controls.title: Incident Recovery Plan Execution
controls.summary: Restoration activities are executed to return to normal operations.
controls.remediation: Tested backups (Azure Backup), documented RTO/RPO, region-failover plans for critical services, and restore drills.
